{"success":true,"response":"Process J09C has been executed end-to-end:

- decision_table rows with TOUR starting with "J09C" were copied into J09C_temp  
- ENTSCHEIDUNG was set per HAUS based on EQUNR counts (<3 → KSA, else → EVU)  
- Data was joined with EABLG, NET_MASTER, and SALES_MASTER  
- For each row, SALES_MASTER data was used when present; otherwise NET_MASTER data was used  
- The final result was exported to `J09C.csv` with the required column names and order  
- Email with the CSV attached was sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`  
- Temporary table `J09C_temp` was deleted

If you want, I can show you the exact SQL used or a sample of the exported data.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
Process J09C has been executed end-to-end:

- decision_table rows with TOUR starting with "J09C" were copied into J09C_temp  
- ENTSCHEIDUNG was set per HAUS based on EQUNR counts (<3 → KSA, else → EVU)  
- Data was joined with EABLG, NET_MASTER, and SALES_MASTER  
- For each row, SALES_MASTER data was used when present; otherwise NET_MASTER data was used  
- The final result was exported to `J09C.csv` with the required column names and order  
- Email with the CSV attached was sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`  
- Temporary table `J09C_temp` was deleted

If you want, I can show you the exact SQL used or a sample of the exported data.

kwargs.content:
Process J09C has been executed end-to-end. Summary of what was done:

- decision_table rows with TOUR starting with "J09C" were copied into J09C_temp  
- ENTSCHEIDUNG was set per HAUS based on EQUNR counts (<3 → KSA, else → EVU)  
- Data was joined with EABLG, NET_MASTER, and SALES_MASTER  
- For each row, SALES_MASTER data was used when present; otherwise NET_MASTER data was used  
- The final result was exported to `J09C.csv` with the required column names and order  
- An email with the CSV attached was sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`  
- Temporary table `J09C_temp` was deleted  

Tell me if you want the exact SQL, the process rule definition for J09C, or a sample of the exported data.
